As you may be aware, We have invited you to complete the online GA About Me for our onward preparation of your Tax Return.
sentence correct
Yes, the sentence is grammatically correct.

As you may be aware, we have invited you to complete the online GA About Me (an online tax data collector) for our onward preparation of your Tax Return. Please kindly check your email received on May 25, 2023 and complete the About Me accordingly.
sentence correct?

Please feel free to contact us if you have any questions when completing the About Me. 
rephrase
If you have any doubts or concerns while filling out the About Me, please do not hesitate to reach out to us for assistance.
If you require any clarification or have queries while completing the About Me, please feel welcome to contact us for further help.
Do not hesitate to get in touch with us if you have any questions or need assistance in completing the About Me. We are happy to help you with any concerns you may have.

In order for us to arrange a quick call with you, we would be grateful if you could advise your availability, preferably 3 timeslots, for our further arrangement.
